summary: Create a language-tier registry mapping every known language ID to an analysis capability tier (None/Generic/Lint/Parse/Full), with a test that fails CI when a new language extension is added to discovery without a tier entry. — delivered via PR #41 (a4e74229); 5 files changed.
title: Create a language-tier registry mapping every known language ID to an analysis capability tier (None/Generic/Lint/Parse/Full), with a test that fails CI when a new language extension is added to discovery without a tier entry.
